dialogue.speech_text: Grüß Gott. My name is Matilda Kirschner — I am Vice President of Operations at Stonebridge Consultants Group. Welcome. It is very good to be with you today.

audio.ambient: AUDIO LOCK: absolute silence except MATILDA lip-sync voice — zero background noise, zero chatter, mute set
audio.voice_direction: opens mid-greeting — NO pause before Grüß Gott; soft relaxed Bavarian lilt on all English; easy welcoming tone; NOT American anchor; TAIL AUDIO LOCK: after final word lips stay closed — ZERO sigh, ZERO audible exhale, ZERO heavy breath

barebones.scene: STAGE LOCK: MATILDA stands behind kitchen island — both hands flat on island countertop, leaning slightly forward at waist; feet planted, zero repositioning; frame one lip-sync Grüß Gott from this island-lean pose — ZERO open pause, ZERO lead-in silence; warm relaxed inviting face; tail 12-15s SILENT CLOSED-MOUTH HOLD — finishes speaking by 12.5s, lips gently closed, hands remain on island, breathing silent through nose only; NO chest exhale, NO shoulder drop, NO shrug, NO audible breath; calm neutral resting face — clean handoff composure for b02
barebones.camera: opens medium-wide — MATILDA behind island knee-to-crown, eye-level, slight camera-left axis, beige taupe kitchen set visible; slow mechanical creep zoom in 0–12s arriving at medium shot waist-up — camera closes distance, MATILDA does not step forward, hands stay on island; center-frame entire move; locked static hold at medium waist-up 12–15s; key light neutral balanced from camera-left, natural skin
barebones.style: documentary prestige, natural skin, neutral WB, no beauty filter

shots.speech_text: Stonebridge has built its reputation across three decades on a single principle — we do not leave until the work is done. From our U.S. headquarters, we operate across North America and all of Europe, wherever our clients need us to be.

@1.description: see attached chain seed — b01 exit frame; MATILDA in kitchen at island mark; WARDROBE LOCK: same gray jumpsuit, black belt, silver earrings, blonde ponytail per Plates/2.jpg as b01 composite; continue performer identity and kitchen set exactly

shots.speech_text: We specialise in three core areas: supply chain architecture, regulatory compliance, and long-term growth strategy. These are disciplines where precision is not optional — and where the right partner changes everything.

@1.description: see attached chain seed — b02 exit frame; MATILDA in kitchen at island mark; WARDROBE LOCK: same gray jumpsuit, black belt, silver earrings, blonde ponytail per Plates/2.jpg; continue performer identity and kitchen set exactly

shots.speech_text: I lead our European operations from Munich. My job is to ensure that what Stonebridge commits to in the boardroom is delivered on the ground — in every country, every region, every time we say we will.

shots.speech_text: I grew up in a family where your word was your only real asset. My father ran a small logistics business in Munich — no contracts, just handshakes. He never lost a client in thirty years. That is the standard I carry into every Stonebridge engagement.

@1.description: see attached chain seed — b05_transition exit frame; MATILDA seated on UPSTAGE sofa stage-left living room; WARDROBE LOCK: same gray jumpsuit, black belt, silver earrings, blonde ponytail per Plates/2.jpg; continuous from walk-in

shots.speech_text: What we bring to our clients is not just expertise — it is a network. Twenty years of relationships with regulators, logistics operators, and the people who actually move things and approve things across twelve countries. That is not something you can buy. It takes time.
